case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. PEABODY CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED MAY-01-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEABODY CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. DOES 1 THRU 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $365.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PEABODY CONSTRUCTION CO., INC.
DECLARATION DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION LAUDEL VILLANUEVA FILED RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION ANSO LOUIE FILED RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORDS (EVID CODE 1521, 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION ERNEST I. KNOWLES FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEABODY CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $21,488.96 DAMAGES, $2,475.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $365.50 COSTS, $547.77 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,877.23, 2 TOPCON GTS 802AR ROBOTIC TOTAL STATIONS; 2 RC-2 FAST-TRAK OPTIONS; 2 TOPCON TP-10 HEAVY DUTY WOOD TRIPODS; 2 TWELVE FOOT COMPOSOLITE PRISM POLES; 2 TOPCON BIPODS; 2 RADIO BATTERIES W/50088 CHARGERS, WHICH EQUIPMENT COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $12,000.00. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PEABODY CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. DOES 1 THRU 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-06-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-07-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-22-2004
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
